stories.headline: Fuel rations and free buses: How countries are responding to rising oil prices
stories.description: Governments around the world have introduced measures to limit the impact of price increases.

stories.headline: Trump wants to invade Iran to seize oil, calls US objectors ‘stupid people’
stories.description: The Trump administration has deployed US Marines in preparation for the possible takeover of Iran’s key oil export hub.

stories.headline: UN peacekeeper killed in southern Lebanon as Israeli invasion intensifies
stories.description: Indonesian peacekeeper has been confirmed killed in artillery fire as Israeli invasion of southern Lebanon intensifies.

stories.headline: Artemis II: Why is Nasa sending people back to the Moon?
stories.description: US returns to the Moon for lunar discoveries and a race with China.

stories.headline: US-Israel war on Iran: What’s happening on day 31 of attacks
stories.description: While Trump has talked about diplomacy, fears of a ground invasion in Iran loom as US troops arrive in the region.
